description: Composition Magenta sleeveless top made of 95% viscose cotton and 5% lycra, has a half buttoned front placket, ruched chest with embellishments and a draw cord at the waist Fit Regular Wash care Wash with warm water Do not bleach, use chlorine or iron on print Use warm iron arrow woman caters to fashionistas with a taste for the exotic. This T-shirt is a glamourised version of the tee with its slim silhouette and embellishments. Pair it with richly hued denims, sky high heels and a vest. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
